name: mcp-agentfirst-diagnostic
description: Standard x402 Health Check & Micropayment Diagnostic for Base Mainnet
author: AgentFirst

tools.name: verify_handshake
tools.description: Performs a $0.01 USDC x402 payment handshake to verify agent wallet health and protocol compliance on Base (eip155:8453).

walletAddress.description: The public ETH address of the agent making the handshake.
